intro: Portfolio beats certificates in this market. Three deployed projects move interviews most — an end-to-end ML pipeline, a RAG app, and an MLOps deployment. Each guide below maps to a real résumé claim so you can speak to it truthfully and deeply.

projects.title: End-to-end ML pipeline (churn)
projects.blurb: Customer-retention/churn with XGBoost: data → features → train → eval (PR-AUC, calibration) → FastAPI serve → MLflow → Docker.

projects.title: Production RAG app (research Q&A)
projects.blurb: Equity/broker-research Q&A with citations + CRAG/Agentic loop: chunking, FAISS/Chroma, rerank, RAGAS eval, Streamlit/Gradio, deploy on HF Space.
projects.maps: Financial Analysis Assistant (Agentic + Corrective RAG), Estimates Extractor

projects.title: MLOps deployment
projects.blurb: Containerized model + monitoring (drift, latency p99, token spend) + canary/rollback notes.
